audited_control_gate.criterion: promote only when an implementation sharing no production estimator code exactly reproduces GC numerator, callable-third denominator, retained-gene count, and value from the checksum-frozen exact native inputs; provenance/dictionary/CDS hard gates must pass; published sources must support the observed biological scale
audited_control_gate.disclosure: post-hoc replacement criterion adopted 2026-07-14 after the legacy bands failed; this is not a widening or rewrite of either frozen band

method.canonical_transcript_rule: unique provider canonical tag, otherwise longest valid translated CDS with bytewise ID tie-break
method.phase_rule: biological 5-prime-to-3-prime order; trim phase only from the first CDS; validate each later phase against cumulative frame
method.pseudogene_and_exception_rule: exclude transcript/CDS with pseudo=true, exception, or transl_except before canonical selection
method.strand_rule: reverse-complement each minus-strand CDS segment before concatenation
method.terminal_stop_rule: exclude one terminal table-1 stop; reject internal stops

gene_weighted_gc3.definition: arithmetic mean/quantiles of per-gene canonical-CDS GC3; each gene has equal weight

literature.comparability: gene-weighted, so comparable to the audit's explicitly separate equal-gene metric; gene set and annotation release differ
literature.definition: mean per-gene GC content of third codon positions
literature.title: Codon Usage Bias and Effective Population Sizes on the X Chromosome versus the Autosomes in Drosophila melanogaster

literature.comparability: gene-weighted; transcript policy and annotation release differ
literature.definition: mean and median per-gene GC3 across 13,088 nuclear protein-coding genes
literature.title: Codon Usage Differences among Genes Expressed in Different Tissues of Drosophila melanogaster

gene_weighted_gc3.definition: arithmetic mean/quantiles of per-gene canonical-CDS GC3; each gene has equal weight

literature.comparability: gene-weighted; provider and canonical-transcript policy differ
literature.definition: per-gene GC3 across approximately 20,000 Ensembl protein-coding genes
literature.title: Mapping the inter- and intra-genic codon-usage landscape in Homo sapiens

literature.comparability: coding-sequence reference context; gene set and release differ
literature.definition: distribution of per-CDS third-position GC in mammalian coding sequences
literature.reported: mammalian CDS mean=0.59; human mean described as above 0.55
literature.title: GC Content of Early Metazoan Genes and Its Impact on Gene Expression Levels in Mammalian Cell Lines

original_control_gate.comparability_finding: not comparable: the asserted 0.55/0.52 point values have no recoverable statistic definition, and both pooled and equal-gene exact-reference estimates exceed them
original_control_gate.trace: git blame traces both anchors to analysis/TIER3_EXECUTION.md commit 0846f05; the file says only 'published values' and supplies no citation, gene/transcript set, terminal-stop policy, or pooled-versus-gene weighting definition

promotion_decision.basis: estimator validity, exact independent reproduction, native-annotation gates, and definition-aware literature comparison; scheduler headroom is explicitly excluded
promotion_decision.reason_no_full_recomputation: no estimator, input, transcript-selection, or exclusion method changed; only the unsupported external validation anchor was replaced after explicit review
